name: HWR_WLNS_ATTACH_RSP
description: This table will be used to store the attachment response.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key of attachment response table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the wellness questionnaire ID which has the attachment.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: The wellness questionnaire version which has the attachment.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: The question ID associated with the questionnaire which allows the attachment.

columns.Name: QUESTION_VERSION
columns.Comments: The question version associated with the question which allows the attachment.

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: The Fusion Id of the participant of the wellness assessment.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning.

columns.Name: QSTN_RESPONSE_ID
columns.Comments: The question response ID for this participant response from questionnaire table.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Last updated date for the participant who submits the attachment for this question.

columns.Name: WLNS_ATTACHMENT_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: WLNS_ATTACHMENT_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: WLNS_ATTACHMENT_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: WLNS_ATTACHMENT_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
